attributes.title: [etcd OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Overview of etcd cluster health: Raft consensus, storage saturation, proposal rates, error indicators, and resource usage.

params.markdown:
## [etcd OTel] Overview

This dashboard provides an overview of etcd cluster health:
- Raft consensus status (leader, proposals)
- Storage saturation (DB size vs quota)
- Error indicators (failed proposals, heartbeat failures)
- Resource usage (memory, file descriptors, goroutines)

query.esql:
TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_has_leader IS NOT NULL
| STATS with_leader = COUNT(etcd_server_has_leader) WHERE etcd_server_has_leader == 1, total = COUNT(etcd_server_has_leader)
| EVAL pct = CASE(total > 0, with_leader * 1.0 / total, 0.0)

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_has_leader IS NOT NULL
| STATS with_leader = COUNT(etcd_server_has_leader) WHERE etcd_server_has_leader == 1, total = COUNT(etcd_server_has_leader)
| EVAL pct = CASE(total > 0, with_leader * 1.0 / total, 0.0)

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_proposals_pending))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_proposals_pending))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_failed_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS failed_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_proposals_failed_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_failed_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS failed_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_proposals_failed_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes > 0
| STATS db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes)), quota = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes))
| EVAL pct = db_size * 1.0 / quota

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes > 0
| STATS db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes)), quota = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes))
| EVAL pct = db_size * 1.0 / quota

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_slow_apply_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS slow_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_slow_apply_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_slow_apply_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS slow_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_slow_apply_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_heartbeat_send_failures_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS hb_fail_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_heartbeat_send_failures_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_heartbeat_send_failures_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS hb_fail_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_heartbeat_send_failures_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_has_leader IS NOT NULL
| STATS has_leader = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_has_leader)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_has_leader IS NOT NULL
| STATS has_leader = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_has_leader)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_pending IS NOT NULL

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_failed_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS failed_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_proposals_failed_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_failed_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS failed_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_proposals_failed_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_leader_changes_seen_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS changes = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_leader_changes_seen_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_leader_changes_seen_total IS NOT NULL

| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: DB Size vs Quota by Instance

query.esql:
TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes > 0
| STATS db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes)), quota = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes)) BY instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| EVAL pct = db_size * 1.0 / quota
| SORT pct DESC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes IS NOT NULL AND etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes > 0
| STATS db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes)), quota = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_quota_backend_bytes)) BY instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| EVAL pct = db_size * 1.0 / quota
| SORT pct DESC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS db_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_mvcc_db_total_size_in_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_put_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_put_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "put" ) ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_range_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_range_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "range" ) ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_delete_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_delete_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "delete" ) ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_txn_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_txn_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "txn" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_put_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_put_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "put" ) ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_range_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_range_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "range" ) ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_delete_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_delete_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "delete" ) ( WHERE etcd_mvcc_txn_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_mvcc_txn_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL op = "txn" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND process_resident_memory_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_resident_memory_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND process_resident_memory_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_resident_memory_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND process_open_fds IS NOT NULL
| STATS fds = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_open_fds)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND process_open_fds IS NOT NULL
| STATS fds = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_open_fds)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND go_goroutines IS NOT NULL
| STATS goroutines = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_goroutines)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND go_goroutines IS NOT NULL
| STATS goroutines = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_goroutines)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_network_client_grpc_received_bytes_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_network_client_grpc_received_bytes_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL direction = "received" ) ( WHERE etcd_network_client_grpc_sent_bytes_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_network_client_grpc_sent_bytes_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL direction = "sent" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_network_client_grpc_received_bytes_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_network_client_grpc_received_bytes_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL direction = "received" ) ( WHERE etcd_network_client_grpc_sent_bytes_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_network_client_grpc_sent_bytes_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL direction = "sent" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC
